purpose: Schema specification for the 6 Firestore collections that implement the Eduversal Induction module. This JSON is consumed by lint:firestore, by FIRESTORE_SCHEMA.md generation, and by future seed and migration scripts. Edit alongside Central Hub/firestore.rules and docs/architecture/FIRESTORE_SCHEMA.md.

collections.name: induction_programs
collections.summary: Handbook templates. One doc per role-version (subject_teacher, principal, specialist).

fields.name: stages
fields.notes: see handbook JSON for stage shape

collections.writers: central_admin only (write); seed script seed-induction-programs.js writes initial 3 docs from handbook JSON files

readScope.get: any authorised user (mentees and mentors need to read their program)

collections.notes: Source of truth is the JSON in docs/induction/. Firestore docs are populated by the seed script. Hand-edits in Firestore that diverge from the JSON are reverted on next seed run.

collections.name: induction_assignments
collections.summary: One doc per induction'd user. Names the three required parties (mentee, mentor, school leader) and the program.

fields.name: hireDate
fields.notes: anchor date for all stage day computations

fields.name: schoolLeaderUid
fields.notes: for principal induction this is the Foundation Rep; for specialist induction this is the HQ Director

fields.name: currentStageId
fields.notes: denormalised, computed from hireDate + program stages

collections.writers: central_admin (create / update status); rule enforces (a) mentor has active certification, (b) all three uids present at create, (c) status transitions follow allowed graph
collections.notes: Unique on uid (one active induction per user). Charter Non-Negotiable 4: cannot create with any of mentee/mentor/schoolLeader missing.

collections.name: induction_progress
collections.summary: One doc per (mentee, task). Task completion state.

fields.name: taskId
fields.notes: from program task array; appears in doc id

fields.name: completedBy
fields.notes: may differ from uid for tasks owned by mentor or school leader

collections.writers: owner (mentee) for self-owned tasks; mentor for mentor-owned tasks; school leader for school-leader-owned tasks; rule checks the task's ownerRole in the program doc against requester's relationship to the assignment

readScope.list: central_admin (cohort completion); mentor for own mentees only (uid where induction_assignments.mentorUid == request.auth.uid); school leader for own school

collections.notes: Doc only created when task is acted on; absence = not yet started. 'completed' = completedAt set. 'mentor-signed-off' = mentorSignedOffAt set (only if program task has mentorSignOffRequired = true).

collections.name: induction_observations
collections.summary: Structured monthly observation records (Stage 3 cycle for subject teachers; specialist walkthroughs in Stage 2 for specialists). Q4 formal evaluation also written here with type='formal_evaluation'.

fields.name: observationNumber
fields.notes: month-of-induction for teacher cycle (2-9), or walkthrough number 1-10 for specialist cycle

fields.name: scored
fields.notes: co-teach and mentee-observes types are unscored

fields.name: menteeReflection
fields.notes: written by mentee after the observation

fields.name: completedAt
fields.notes: set when observer marks the write-up as final; expected within 7 days of observationDate per Charter

collections.writers: observerUid only (create + update until completedAt set)

readScope.get: menteeUid / observerUid / mentorUid (from induction_assignments) / schoolLeaderUid (from induction_assignments) / central_admin
readScope.list: central_admin; menteeUid for own observations; observerUid for own-authored

collections.notes: Charter Non-Negotiable 1: this collection NEVER feeds teacher_appraisal_results. There is no automatic propagation. Year-1 mentee data is induction-scope only.

collections.name: induction_journal
collections.summary: Mentee's private reflections — daily/weekly/per-task. Most-protected collection.

fields.name: responses
fields.notes: keyed by prompt key from promptSet

readScope.get: owner always; mentor if visibility >= mentee_and_mentor; schoolLeader if visibility == mentee_mentor_school_leader; central_admin NEVER on named entries (rule blocks)
readScope.list: owner only; mentor for own mentees with visibility >= mentee_and_mentor; central_admin NEVER (rule blocks even for HQ)

collections.notes: Charter Non-Negotiable 2: HQ never reads named journal entries. Aggregate analysis (e.g. 'how many mentees wrote a journal entry this week') uses Cloud Function aggregation that strips uid before write to a separate induction_journal_aggregates collection (see below).

collections.name: induction_pulses
collections.summary: Weekly 1-question pulse responses. Anonymised at school level for HQ.

readScope.list: owner only; mentor for own mentees; schoolLeader for own school; central_admin reads aggregated view only (rule routes named queries through Cloud Function that anonymises)

collections.notes: Two-consecutive-low-score alarm: a Cloud Function watches creates and on second-consecutive score <= 2 sends notification to mentorUid + schoolLeaderUid (from induction_assignments). Mentee is informed in advance that this alarm exists. Charter Principle 5.

collections.name: mentor_certifications
collections.summary: Mentor Certification ledger. A user is eligible to be assigned as mentor only if active=true and validUntil is in the future.

fields.name: active
fields.notes: false if revoked or expired (cron job updates this)

readScope.get: owner; central_admin; school leader (to verify mentor candidates in their school); HQ Director (to verify principal/specialist mentor candidates)
readScope.list: central_admin; school leader for same-school candidates

indexes.purpose: fast 'is this user a certified mentor' check at assignment time

collections.notes: Charter Non-Negotiable 3: assignment rule reads this collection at induction_assignments create time.

collections.name: induction_journal_aggregates
collections.summary: Cloud-Function-maintained anonymous aggregates for HQ telemetry. Strictly no uid present.

readScope.get: any authorised user (HQ telemetry — no PII)

collections.notes: Aggregator that satisfies HQ analytics needs without violating Charter Non-Negotiable 2.

additionalUserFields.notes: Stage label per role. Null when user has no active induction. Denormalised; the canonical state is induction_assignments.status + currentStageId.
Denormalised mirror of mentor_certifications.active. Set by Cloud Function on certification create / expire / revoke. Used by UI to filter mentor pickers.

rolesUsedByRules.isAHUserAtSameSchool(menteeUid): (existing helper, reused for school-leader same-school checks)

transitions.trigger: extension stage final task signed off

openItems: Cloud Function for two-consecutive-low-pulse alarm (Phase 1 follow-up).
Cloud Function for induction_journal_aggregates maintenance (Phase 1 follow-up).
Cron job for mentor_certifications expiry sweeping (Phase 1 follow-up).
Decide whether induction_observations should propagate any anonymised signal to network_health.html dashboards (Charter Principle 3 says no individual data; aggregate trends allowed).
